task_description: Redesign the Si-Admin dashboard with bold, distinctive design following Frontend steering principles: custom typography, dramatic color palette, CSS animations/micro-interactions, asymmetric spatial composition, atmospheric backgrounds, and decorative visual details. Keep all functionality intact.

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly (all routes compile). npx tsc --noEmit exits with 0 errors. npm run lint exits with 0 (19 pre-existing issues unrelated to changes). No test framework configured - only lint. No Dockerfile in project.
